title: EIA: US biofuel production up 6% in 2024
content: Total U.S. biofuels production, including ethanol, renewable diesel, biodiesel and other biofuels, including sustainable aviation fuel (SAF), averaged a record 1.39 million barrels per day last year, according to data released by the U.S. Energy Information Administration on June 9. The 1.39 million barrels per day of production reported for 2024 was up 6% when compared to the previous record, which was set at 1.32 million barrels per day in 2023.
author: Analysts Account
